title: AXE
summary: Hero axe asset study — worn metal, wood grip, and studio lighting for a portfolio-ready weapon render.
problem: Deliver a believable hand axe with readable material contrast between blade steel, edge wear, and handle wood under controlled lighting.
approach: Blocked proportions from reference, sculpted edge chips and surface variation, then textured metal patina and wood grain in Substance before final beauty lighting.
outcome: Final stills and supporting angles packaged for asset design portfolio and client pitch use.

process.caption: Silhouette, head-to-handle proportions, and edge placement from reference.
Metal wear, wood shaders, and lighting tests before final comp.
